---
title: "Colophon"
---

This page documents the tools used to build and publish this site.

| Tool | Role | Details |
|------|------|---------|
| [Quarto](https://quarto.org) | Static site | Source files are `.qmd` — markdown + code chunks rendered to HTML via `quarto render` |
| [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com) | Hosting / CI/CD | Deployed from the `gh-pages` branch via GitHub Actions on every commit to `main` |
| [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com) | Editor | Quarto extension provides live preview, chunk execution, and YAML frontmatter validation |
